code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0

  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n % 2 == 0
      evens = list.push(evens, n)
    else
      odds = list.push(odds, n)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut evens_str = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < evens.len()
    let val = match evens.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      evens_str = "#{val}"
    else
      evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{val}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut odds_str = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < odds.len()
    let val = match odds.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      odds_str = "#{val}"
    else
      odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{val}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  print("evens=#{evens_str}")
  print("odds=#{odds_str}")

  Ok(())
end
